title: Gates 1-5 Capstone with New Architecture

gate1.name: Infrastructure Validation
gate1.evidence: All core components operational; 3 Lean failures are environmental

gate2.name: Structural Independence
gate2.evidence: New arch proof rate 23.3% (14/60) vs old 56%; structural test not re-run

gate3.name: Lemma Novelty
gate3.evidence: Contrastive CharCNN cannot retrieve correct lemmas from 70K candidates

gate4.name: Negative Control (Era-Gated Discovery)
gate4.evidence: Old arch: no era-specific interaction (p=0.93). New arch: not evaluated — retrieval is prerequisite

gate5.name: Multi-Step Proof Capstone
gate5.evidence: 2 structural multi-step proofs (rw[h];ring) but 0 lemma-novelty; dense rewards cannot contribute with 0/64 proved

what_works: Best-first search (2 multi-step proofs MCTS never found)
Dense reward mechanism (step validity, goal proximity, completion bonus)
Infrastructure (tests pass, graph builds, proof checker works)
what_does_not_work: InfoNCE in-batch training (255 negatives insufficient for 70K lemmas)
Lemma scoring as primary action selector (all 14 gate3 theorems chose wrong tactics)
Dense rewards without retrieval (cannot contribute with 0/64 proved)
recommendation: NO v1.0 release. Fix retrieval first (stronger embeddings, larger negative sets, or hybrid GNN+best-first). Then re-run gates.
